About Me

Motivated Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) fresher with strong problem-solving skills and a solid foundation in software engineering and application development.

Experienced in building practical solutions — from real-time transit tracking mobile apps to interactive web portals. Eager to leverage skills in Java, PHP, Blender, and Flutter to contribute to a dynamic development team.

My Projects

Work Showcase

🚌

Public Bus Tracking System

Real-Time Transit App
  • Engineered a comprehensive, role-based mobile application for Admins, Drivers, and Passengers using Flutter and Dart, ensuring seamless performance across Android and iOS.
  • Built a cost-effective live tracking system via geolocator plugin and Firebase Cloud Firestore, transforming drivers' smartphones into active GPS broadcasters.
  • Integrated Firebase Auth for secure role-specific logins, and used cloud storage for digitizing daily vehicle health reports and compliance documents.
  • Replaced manual transit schedules with a transparent digital ecosystem, improving passenger wait-time predictability and fleet oversight.
Flutter Firebase Dart Google Maps
GitHub
🌐

College Navigation System

Interactive Web Portal
  • Built a responsive web portal featuring a custom 3D interactive campus map built with Blender and Three.js, streamlining navigation across departments.
  • Developed a dynamic faculty directory and appointment booking system using PHP and MySQL, with real-time approval notifications.
  • Built an automated attendance management module that allows faculty to record data and provides students with real-time percentage tracking.
  • Integrated secure, role-based dashboards (Admin, Faculty, Student) using HTML, CSS, and JS to centralize campus communications.
PHP MySQL JavaScript XAMPP
GitHub
✦

3D Portfolio

Immersive 3D Experience

This very site — scroll-driven 3D world in Three.js & Blender with a space scene, animated staircase character & nature gallery.
